# Privacy Policy

Encoding Guard is a local-first Codex plugin.

## Data Handling

- The plugin works on files in the local workspace selected by the user.
- The included PowerShell scripts inspect file contents only to detect encoding issues such as BOM markers and replacement characters.
- The plugin does not include any built-in network transmission logic.
- The plugin may create local backup files before rewriting content.

## User Responsibility

- The user is responsible for choosing which repositories and files to scan or modify.
- If Codex, Git, SVN, or other host tools collect telemetry, logging, or usage data, that behavior is governed by those tools, not by this plugin itself.

## Contact

For questions about this plugin, contact `chengjiecui83@gmail.com`.
